ddls:
CREATE TABLE "devices" (
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the device */,
  "endpoint_type" INTEGER /* Type of endpoint (e.g., Desktop PC, Laptop) */,
  "min_memory_size" INTEGER /* Minimum memory size required for the device */,
  "storage_size" INTEGER /* Storage size of the device */,
  "processor" INTEGER /* Processor type */,
  "wi_fi_chip" INTEGER /* Wi-Fi chip specification */,
  "supported_from_igel_os_version" INTEGER /* Version of IGEL OS supported by the device */,
  "note" TEXT /* Note or comment about the device */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the device belongs to */,
  "subcategory_id" INTEGER /* ID of the subcategory the device belongs to */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model the device belongs to */,
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manufacturer of the device */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the device was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the device was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_devices_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES device_models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_devices_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES device_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_devices_supported_from_igel_os_version FOREIGN KEY ("supported_from_igel_os_version") REFERENCES igel_os_versions ("igel_os_version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_devices_processor FOREIGN KEY ("processor") REFERENCES processors ("processor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_devices_endpoint_type FOREIGN KEY ("endpoint_type") REFERENCES endpoint_types ("endpoint_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_devices_subcategory_id FOREIGN KEY ("subcategory_id") REFERENCES device_subcategories ("subcategory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_devices_manufacturer_id FOREIGN KEY ("manufacturer_id") REFERENCES device_manufacturers ("manufacturer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_devices_wi_fi_chip FOREIGN KEY ("wi_fi_chip") REFERENCES wi_fi_chips ("wi_fi_chip_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "endpoint_types" (
  "endpoint_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each endpoint type */,
  "endpoint_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the endpoint type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the endpoint type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("endpoint_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "processors" (
  "processor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each processor */,
  "processor_name" TEXT /* Name of the processor */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the processor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("processor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "wi_fi_chips" (
  "wi_fi_chip_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each Wi-Fi chip */,
  "wi_fi_chip_name" TEXT /* Name of the Wi-Fi chip */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the Wi-Fi chip */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("wi_fi_chip_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "igel_os_versions" (
  "igel_os_version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each IGEL OS version */,
  "igel_os_version_name" TEXT /* Name of the IGEL OS version */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the IGEL OS version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("igel_os_version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_notes" (
  "note_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each note */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device the note is associated with */,
  "note_text" TEXT /* Text of the note */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the note was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the note was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("note_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_notes_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history entry */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device the change was made to */,
  "changed_at" TEXT /* Date the change was made */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "changed_field" TEXT /* Field that was changed */,
  "old_value" TEXT /* Old value of the field */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* New value of the field */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_history_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_compatibility" (
  "compatibility_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compatibility entry */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device */,
  "igel_os_version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the IGEL OS version */,
  "compatible" INTEGER /* Whether the device is compatible with the IGEL OS version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("compatibility_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_compatibility_igel_os_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("igel_os_version_id") REFERENCES igel_os_versions ("igel_os_version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_compatibility_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_requirements" (
  "requirement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each requirement */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device */,
  "requirement_name" TEXT /* Name of the requirement */,
  "requirement_value" INTEGER /* Value of the requirement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("requirement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_requirements_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, user) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the device */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the device was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_subcategories" (
  "subcategory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subcategory */,
  "subcategory_name" TEXT /* Name of the subcategory */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the subcategory */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the subcategory belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subcategory_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "subcategory_id" INTEGER /* ID of the subcategory the model belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_models_subcategory_id FOREIGN KEY ("subcategory_id") REFERENCES device_subcategories ("subcategory_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_manufacturers" (
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manufacturer */,
  "manufacturer_name" TEXT /* Name of the manufacturer */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the manufacturer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manufacturer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_model_manufacturer" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device model */,
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manufacturer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id", "manufacturer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_department" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_location" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_usage" (
  "usage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each usage event */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device being used */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department using the device */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the device is being used */,
  "usage_date" TEXT /* Date when the device was used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_usage_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES device_location ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_usage_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_usage_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES device_department ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_audit" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit entry */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device that was changed */,
  "changed_at" TEXT /* Date when the change was made */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "changed_field" TEXT /* Field that was changed */,
  "old_value" TEXT /* Old value of the field */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* New value of the field */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_audit_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., usage, compatibility) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)
